sentences.target: Die Jugend hängt im Park ab.

translations.de: Die Jugend hängt im Park ab.
translations.en: Young people hang out in the park.
translations.es: Los jóvenes pasan el rato en el parque.
translations.it: I ragazzi si ritrovano al parco.
translations.pt: Os jovens passam o tempo no parque.
translations.vi: Giới trẻ tụ tập ở công viên.
translations.nl: Jongeren hangen rond in het park.
translations.hi: युवा पार्क में समय बिताते हैं.
translations.el: Οι νέοι κάνουν παρέα στο πάρκο.
translations.ro: Tinerii își petrec timpul în parc.
translations.ja: 若者たちは公園で集まっている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative singular feminine, modifying 'Jugend' as the subject.
Common noun; feminine singular in nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present of the separable verb 'abhängen' (colloquial: 'to hang out').
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition expressing static location and incorporating the dative article.
Common noun; masculine dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im' (locative).
Separable verbal particle completing 'abhängen'; appears clause-final in main clauses.

sentences.target: In der Jugend war ich oft draußen.
sentences.reading: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈjuːɡn̩t vaːʁ ɪç ɔft ˈdʁaʊ̯sən/

translations.de: In der Jugend war ich oft draußen.
translations.ipa: /ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈjuːɡn̩t vaːʁ ɪç ɔft ˈdʁaʊ̯sən/
translations.en: In my youth, I was often outside.
translations.fr: Quand j'étais jeune, j'étais souvent dehors.
translations.ko: 젊었을 때는 자주 밖에 나가곤 했어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我年轻的时候经常在外面。
translations.yue: 我後生嗰陣成日喺出面。
translations.ru: В молодости я часто бывал на улице.
translations.pt: Quando eu era jovem, saía muito.
translations.vi: Hồi trẻ tôi thường ở ngoài trời.
translations.ar: في شبابي كنت كثيرًا في الخارج.
translations.nl: Toen ik jong was, was ik vaak buiten.
translations.uk: У молодості я часто був надворі.
translations.hi: जवानी में मैं अक्सर बाहर रहता था.
translations.pl: W młodości często bywałem na zewnątrz.
translations.el: Όταν ήμουν νέος, ήμουν συχνά έξω.
translations.nb: Da jeg var ung, var jeg ofte ute.
translations.id: Waktu muda, saya sering di luar.
translations.sv: När jag var ung var jag ofta ute.
translations.ro: Când eram tânăr, eram des afară.
translations.cs: Když jsem byl mladý, často jsem byl venku.
translations.da: Da jeg var ung, var jeg ofte ude.
translations.ja: 若い頃はよく外に出ていました。

tokens.explanation: Preposition marking a temporal/locative phrase; here introducing a temporal PP ('during youth') that takes dative.
Definite article; dative singular feminine agreeing with 'Jugend'.
Common noun; feminine dative singular; head of the temporal prepositional phrase.
Finite auxiliary/copular 'sein'; 1st person singular preterite; links subject 'ich' to the predicate 'draußen'.
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Frequency adverb modifying the verb phrase ('was often').
Locative adverb functioning as predicate complement with 'sein'.

sentences.target: Das Konzert richtet sich an die Jugend.
sentences.reading: /das kɔnˈtsɛʁt ˈʁɪçtət zɪç an diː ˈjuːɡn̩t/

translations.de: Das Konzert richtet sich an die Jugend.
translations.ipa: /das kɔnˈtsɛʁt ˈʁɪçtət zɪç an diː ˈjuːɡn̩t/
translations.en: The concert is aimed at young people.
translations.es: El concierto está dirigido a los jóvenes.
translations.it: Il concerto è rivolto ai giovani.
translations.ko: 그 콘서트는 젊은 사람들을 대상으로 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 这场音乐会面向年轻人。
translations.yue: 呢場音樂會係針對年輕人。
translations.pt: O concerto é voltado para os jovens.
translations.vi: Buổi hòa nhạc hướng đến giới trẻ.
translations.nl: Het concert is gericht op jongeren.
translations.hi: संगीत कार्यक्रम युवाओं के लिए है.
translations.id: Konser itu ditujukan untuk anak muda.
translations.ja: そのコンサートは若者向けです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter nominative singular, modifying 'Konzert' as the subject.
Common noun; neuter nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 3rd person singular present; used reflexively in the pattern 'sich an + Akk.' meaning 'to be directed at/target'.
Reflexive pronoun; 3rd person accusative; required by the verb 'sich richten an'.
Preposition selecting accusative; marks the target of orientation ('an die Jugend').
Definite article; accusative singular feminine agreeing with 'Jugend' as the object of 'an'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'an'.

sentences.target: Wir suchen Ideen für die Jugend.

translations.de: Wir suchen Ideen für die Jugend.
translations.en: We're looking for ideas for young people.
translations.fr: Nous recherchons des idées pour les jeunes.
translations.ko: 우리는 청소년을 위한 아이디어를 찾고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在找给年轻人的主意。
translations.yue: 我哋搵緊畀年輕人嘅主意。
translations.pt: Estamos procurando ideias para os jovens.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang tìm ý tưởng cho giới trẻ.
translations.hi: हम युवाओं के लिए विचार ढूंढ रहे हैं.
translations.nb: Vi leter etter ideer til ungdom.
translations.id: Kami mencari ide untuk anak muda.
translations.sv: Vi letar efter idéer för ungdomar.
translations.ja: 若者向けのアイデアを探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb; 1st person plural present; main predicate ('we seek/are looking for').
Common noun; plural accusative as the direct object of 'suchen'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a beneficiary/target PP.
Definite article; accusative singular feminine, agreeing with 'Jugend' as the object of 'für'.
Common noun; feminine accusative singular; object of the preposition 'für'.
